stories.headline: ‘Nemesis’ Renewed For Season 2 At Netflix - Deadline
stories.summary: Netflix has renewed its freshman crime drama series Nemesis, from Courtney A. Kemp and Tani Marole, for a second season.

stories.headline: Blake Lively Wants $8M In Legal Fees From Justin Baldoni - Deadline
stories.summary: A month after an 11th hour settlement in Blake Lively & Justin Baldoni's long legal battle, the It Ends With Us actress is seeking over $8M in lawyers' fees

stories.headline: Taylor Sheridan says he doesn't care what critics think, admits to 'rage baiting' them on purpose - Fox News
stories.summary: Taylor Sheridan says critics can't stand that he doesn't care what they think, revealing on a podcast how he deliberately rage baits them all.

stories.headline: Director Carl Rinsch is sentenced to prison in $11M fraud case over unfinished Netflix show - NBC News
stories.summary: NEW YORK — Hollywood writer-director Carl Rinsch was sentenced Monday to 2 1/2 years in prison after being convicted of defrauding Netflix out of $11 million for a never-finished sci-fi series.

stories.headline: Pokémon TCG: 30th Celebration Product Showcase - Pokemon.com
stories.summary: There’s a ton of products to look out for when this exciting new expansion launches, and we’re breaking them all down.

stories.headline: British Government Likely to Intervene in Paramount’s Proposed $110 Billion Takeover of Warner Bros. Discovery - Variety
stories.summary: The British government has signalled that it is likely to intervene in Paramount Skydance’s proposed $110 billion takeover of Warner Bros. Discover.

stories.headline: ’60 Minutes’ Shakeup: Bari Weiss Hit as Another Top Staffer Quits - TV Insider
stories.summary: The news comes after the firing of Scott Pelley, Sharyn Alfonsi and others.

stories.headline: France's 'most beautiful girl in the world' Thylane Blondeau is off the market - USA Today
stories.summary: Thylane Blondeau, who came to fame as a child when she was dubbed "the most beautiful little girl in the world," has married actor Ben Attal in Paris.
